title: THE CODE IS SMALLER THAN YOU THINK

captions.text: a dict of personas · a loop over a shared thread · one judge call

lines.text: You might assume this needs a framework. It doesn’t. Here’s the entire skeleton.
A dict of personas. A loop where each agent sees the full thread and appends to it. And one judge call at the end. That’s the whole pattern.

A production version adds a convergence check, length caps, retries. And everything frameworks like AutoGen, LangGraph or CrewAI add on top, typed schemas, smarter speaker selection, streaming, is refinement on this same skeleton. Build the loop once yourself and the frameworks stop being magic.
